items.title: Chinese APT deploys new malware to keep access to hacked networks

items.title: Flipper One — we need your help
items.summary: With Flipper One, we're reimagining what a Linux cyberdeck can be — it's a huge project. We're opening up the development process and asking the community for help.

items.title: Firmware 1.0 Released
items.summary: Meet the first major release of Flipper Zero firmware — version 1.0. In this release, we have completed work on many features that have been in development for 3 years and are now stable. In this post, we’ll show you what’s new in Firmware 1.

items.title: Diving into RFID Protocols with Flipper Zero
items.summary: RFID is a contactless radio-tag technology. It is quite common and you may see it in a lot of places: intercoms, bank cards, public transport passes, office passes, they are used to track domestic animals, for toll collection, etc. The two main RFID tag types
